steps.assistant_text: Big-endian signed 16-bit stream reader over unsigned char** cursor. Keys: (1) 'short v' intermediate (not folded int) preserves IDO's redundant inner sign-extend sll8/sll16/sra16 on the first byte; (2) 'v = byte | v' (byte on LEFT, not v|=byte) gives or v1,t7,v1 operand order.
